title: achnatherum inebrians
intro: Achnatherum inebrians, also known as the sleepygrass or inebriating grass, is a species of grass that belongs to the family Poaceae and is native to the mountainous regions of western North America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its ability to induce sleep, reduce inflammation, and act as a diuretic. The health benefits of Achnatherum inebrians include its potential to lower blood pressure, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of anxiety and insomnia. Achnatherum inebrians can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is sometimes used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
